---
title: "Fundamentals of Excel for Data Driven Decision Making"
subtitle: "Advanced Techniques"
date: 2025-09-02
---

### Schedule

| Time | Activity | Facilitator |
| ---- | -------- | ----------- |
| 8:00 – 10:00 AM | Data Validation Techniques | Winnie Chacha / Henry Kissinger / Caroline Mugo |
| | Power Query | |
| | Pivot Tables | |
| | Data Visualization & Excel Charting | |
| | Pivot Charts | |
| | Interactive Dashboards | |
| | Post-training Survey | |
| 4:00 – 5:00 PM | Practicals | Mentors |


### Materials
Download all the materials
[Download zip](/materials/workshop_1/day-6/day_6.zip){.btn .btn-secondary}

### Reference Document
<iframe src="/materials/workshop_1/day-5/Excel%20Fundamentals%20Day%20One.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](/materials/workshop_1/day-5/Excel%20Fundamentals%20Day%20One.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}


## Video Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}
